# Sample chapter

## Purpose

This sample chapter shows the expected shape of a chapter file. Replace it with verified project material before using the manuscript as a real draft.

## Central question

Each chapter should answer one central question tied to the book scope.

## Argument sequence

1. Opening problem.
2. Evidence-based development.
3. Counterargument or limitation.
4. Provisional conclusion.

## Evidence notes

Use only verified source notes and citekeys from `../../bibliography/references.bib`.

## Open issues

Keep support gaps visible until they are resolved through notes, claim records, or audits.
